title: Suez Canal blockage — Ever Given grounding
description: The container ship Ever Given runs aground in the Suez Canal on March 23, 2021, blocking one of the world's most critical shipping lanes for six days. Approximately 12% of global trade passes through the canal. Over 450 ships are delayed. The blockage causes an estimated $9.6B per day in disrupted trade. The ship is refloated on March 29.
